calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2010 Continued To Dec-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-18-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Scott Hughes, #12365.

Edward Sarti, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Michael G. Schinner, dba the Schinner Law Group.
No appearance by defendant Mallory Stechishin.
Default was entered against defendant on June 22, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on November 17, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Michael G. Schinner, dba the Schinner Law Group, and against the Defaulted Defendant Mallory Stechishin as follows:

Damages/Principal - $32,248.77.
Prejudgment Interest - $0.00.
Attorney Fees - $2,806.00.
Costs - $0.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $35,054.77.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
